title: Dinar's Crafts & Additions
description: Changes most of the textures of the Create Crafts & Additions mod
body:
About
---
This resource pack changes almost all the textures of items and blocks in the Crafts & Additions mod. The copper color from Create 0.5 has been changed to match vanilla copper. The rolling mill now looks more "metallic". The biomass texture now has a darker green tint.

Other resource-packs you might like
